## Validation

- [ ] Formatting and static checks passed.
- [ ] Unit and golden report tests passed.
- [ ] Positive compiler fixture passed.
- [ ] Refusal/adversarial fixture passed.
- [ ] Source tree remained unchanged during diagnosis.
- [ ] Human and JSON output agree.

## Compatibility

Document schema, CLI, toolchain, artifact, or plugin compatibility changes. State `none` only after checking each surface.
